assertionResults.fullName: Deep Verification - Streams & Transactions Stream (SSE) Endpoint Exists should return 200 and connect to market stream
assertionResults.title: should return 200 and connect to market stream

assertionResults.fullName: Deep Verification - Streams & Transactions Transaction Balance Sync (Buy) should subtract BRL balance and add asset correctly
assertionResults.title: should subtract BRL balance and add asset correctly

assertionResults.fullName: Deep Verification - Streams & Transactions Transaction Balance Sync (Sell) should add BRL balance and subtract asset correctly
assertionResults.title: should add BRL balance and subtract asset correctly

assertionResults.fullName: Deep Verification - Streams & Transactions Transaction Balance Sync (Sell) should remove asset row if quantity reaches zero
assertionResults.title: should remove asset row if quantity reaches zero

assertionResults.fullName: Market API GET /api/market/instruments should return popular instruments when no query is provided
assertionResults.title: should return popular instruments when no query is provided

assertionResults.fullName: Market API GET /api/market/instruments should filter instruments by name/query
assertionResults.title: should filter instruments by name/query

assertionResults.fullName: Market API GET /api/market/instruments should filter instruments by type
assertionResults.title: should filter instruments by type

assertionResults.fullName: Market API GET /api/market/instruments should return empty list for non-existent query
assertionResults.title: should return empty list for non-existent query

assertionResults.fullName: Market API GET /api/market/instruments/:id should return instrument details for valid ID
assertionResults.title: should return instrument details for valid ID

assertionResults.fullName: Market API GET /api/market/instruments/:id should return 404 for invalid instrument ID
assertionResults.title: should return 404 for invalid instrument ID

assertionResults.fullName: Market API GET /api/market/instruments/:id/stream should establish SSE connection for valid instrument ID
assertionResults.title: should establish SSE connection for valid instrument ID

assertionResults.fullName: Market API GET /api/market/instruments/:id/stream should return 404 for streaming non-existent instrument
assertionResults.title: should return 404 for streaming non-existent instrument

assertionResults.fullName: Portfolio API GET /api/portfolio/summary should return complete summary including 100k cash
assertionResults.title: should return complete summary including 100k cash

assertionResults.fullName: Portfolio API GET /api/portfolio/summary should explicitly verify that totalBalance matches availableBalance + totalCurrent
assertionResults.title: should explicitly verify that totalBalance matches availableBalance + totalCurrent

assertionResults.fullName: Portfolio API GET /api/portfolio/summary should include categorized stats (byType)
assertionResults.title: should include categorized stats (byType)

assertionResults.fullName: Portfolio API GET /api/portfolio/summary should include enriched assets list with instrumentId
assertionResults.title: should include enriched assets list with instrumentId

assertionResults.fullName: Portfolio API GET /api/portfolio should return list of assets enriched with real-time data
assertionResults.title: should return list of assets enriched with real-time data
